title: Engineering miRNA-223 nanocomplexes via bioorthogonal self-assembly for precision therapy of intervertebral disc degeneration.
snippet: Intervertebral disc degeneration (IVDD) is characterized by inflammation-driven pyroptosis of nucleus pulposus (NP) cells. While oligonucleotide-based gene therapy holds promise for precision intervention, its clinical translation is hindered by inefficient cellular delivery and rapid lysosomal degradation. Here, we identified miRNA-223 as a pivotal regulat...
importanceSignals: priority topic: gene therapy, translational medicine
